title: IP:PORT is inaccessible
body:
I deployed a project using Podman on my own computer's WSL. It can only be accessed locally via localhost:3010. 
However, in the same network, others cannot access it via http://172.26.165.130:3010. 
The check shows: 
listen 0 4096 0.0.0.0:3010 0.0.0.0:* users: (("conmon", pid=3003574, fd=5))
podman-compose version 1.5.0
podman version 3.4.4

yyq@LAPTOP-CU90I4B4:/mnt/c/Users/lenovo$ ip a
1: lo: <LOOPBACK,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 65536 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/loopback 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd 00:00:00:00:00:00
    inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet 10.255.255.254/32 brd 10.255.255.254 scope global lo
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 ::1/128 scope host
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
2: eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1460 qdisc mq state UP group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 00:15:5d:97:7c:dc brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    altname enx00155d977cdc
    inet 172.26.165.130/20 brd 172.26.175.255 scope global eth0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 fe80::215:5dff:fe97:7cdc/64 scope link
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever

comments.body: plese retest with a more recent version of podman.  we also in now way support podman-compose as it is not affiliated with this project.

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
